title: Seven times creators lost out after depending on tech platforms and why OpenAI’s ‘Critterz’ may be the latest example
summary: From YouTube’s Adpocalypse to Facebook’s publisher pivot and OpenAI’s Critterz controversy, creators have repeatedly faced losses after relying too heavily on tech platforms. As AI tools spread across creative industries, concerns are growing over sudden policy, pricing and product changes.

title: Before you replace your HDD with an SSD, here’s why some users still prefer hard drives
summary: SSDs make laptops and PCs feel much faster, but HDDs still offer cheaper high-capacity storage. The right choice depends on your usage and storage needs.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI set for November 19 launch, Take-Two confirms; $8 billion in bookings eyed
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI video game (GTA 6) will launch on 19 November 2026, announced Take-Two Interactive during its latest earnings report. The company also projected fiscal 2027 bookings of up to $8.2 billion, with analysts expecting the blockbuster game to drive massive sales and industry growth.

title: Microsoft veteran Yusuf Mehdi to exit after 35 years
summary: After 35 years at Microsoft, consumer chief marketing officer Yusuf Mehdi announced his departure, planning to leave in June 2027. Mehdi, a key figure in product launches from Windows 95 to Copilot Plus PCs, will focus on Windows, Microsoft 365, and the One Copilot vision during his remaining time.

summary: Beware of a cunning phishing scam targeting iPhone users who have lost their devices. title: SpaceX's Starship flight hits most targets in pre-IPO test
summary: SpaceX's latest Starship test flight achieved a significant milestone, deploying mock satellites and executing a controlled splashdown. This successful uncrewed launch, the first of its V3 iteration, bolsters investor confidence ahead of the company's anticipated IPO next month.

title: Bihar to roll out AI policy soon: CM Samrat Choudhary
summary: Bihar is set to become a major AI hub. The government will soon launch an AI policy to transform governance and development. AI will enhance transparency in welfare schemes and speed up complaint resolution. The state aims for technological advancement and economic prosperity.

title: Novo Nordisk uses AI to fast-track drug launches, expand India role
summary: Novo Nordisk is leveraging Artificial Intelligence to significantly speed up new drug launches. The company expects to cut down the time to market by as much as two-thirds. Its center in Bengaluru, India, is becoming crucial for global drug preparations.
